{
  "analysis": "The attack failed - recovered None. I need to debug by tracing the internal state of the encryption to verify my understanding of the cipher structure and differential characteristic. Let me write a test to check the intermediate values.",
  "plan": "Write a debug script that traces L and R through each round, verifies the differential at each stage, and checks the relationship between ciphertext and internal state.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/debug.py << 'ENDOFCODE'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import feal
import random
random.seed(42)

feal.create_random_keys()
print("Keys:", feal.key)

def encrypt_trace(plaintext):
    left = feal.getleft(plaintext)
    right = feal.getright(plaintext)
    print(f"  P: L={left:#010x}, R={right:#010x}")
    
    left ^= feal.key[0]
    right ^= feal.key[1]
    print(f"  After whiten: L={left:#010x}, R={right:#010x}")
    
    right ^= left
    print(f"  After pre-mix: L={left:#010x}, R={right:#010x}")
    
    for round_num in range(4):
        mixed = feal.f_function(right ^ feal.key[round_num + 2])
        temp = right
        right = left ^ mixed
        left = temp
        print(f"  After round {round_num}: L={left:#010x}, R={right:#010x}")
    
    left ^= right
    print(f"  After post-mix: L={left:#010x}, R={right:#010x}")
    
    cipher = feal.merge(right, left)
    print(f"  Cipher: {cipher:#018x} (left_half={feal.getleft(cipher):#010x}, right_half={feal.getright(cipher):#010x})")
    return cipher

p1 = random.randint(0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF)
p2 = p1 ^ (0x80800000 << 32 | 0x80800000)

print("Encrypting P1:")
c1 = encrypt_trace(p1)
print("Encrypting P2:")
c2 = encrypt_trace(p2)

print(f"\nDelta P: {p1 ^ p2:#018x}")
print(f"Delta C: {c1 ^ c2:#018x}")
print(f"Delta C_left: {feal.getleft(c1) ^ feal.getleft(c2):#010x}")
print(f"Delta C_right: {feal.getright(c1) ^ feal.getright(c2):#010x}")
ENDOFCODE
",
      "duration": 0.5
    }
  ]
}
